ab: makuwa u i iyan?
ch: A:你要去哪裡?
en: A: Where are you going?

ab: makuwa ku i sayheng semalema za kulang.
ch: B:我要去菜園裡種菜。
en: B: I’m going to plant vegetables in the garden.

ab: kemakuda u?
ch: A:你在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: tralutralun lra zi, penapitaw ku za tralun, puwazanum ku nu haremay.
ch: B:草太多了，我在鋤草，等一下要澆水。
en: B: There’s too much grass, I’m hoaxing the grass, I need to water it later.

ab: traluwalun lra zi, penapitaw ku za tralun, puwa’enay ku nu haremay.
ch: B:草太多了，我在鋤草，等一下要澆水。
en: B: There’s too much grass, I’m hoaxing the grass, I need to water it later.

ab: urunganay ku kana kawkaw zi pitaw maw?
ch: A:幫我把鐮刀和鋤頭拿來好嗎?
en: A: Will you get my scythes and hoes, please?

ab: nu retra’anay i iyan?
ch: B:你放在哪裡?
en: B: Where did you put it?

ab: ku retra’anay i trapingiran kana kangkang.
ch: A:我放在犁耙旁邊。
en: A: I put it next to the plow and rake.

ab: piya u lra kemangkang?
ch: A:你翻過土了嗎?
en: A: Did you turn over the soil?

ab: penapiya ku kemangkang, sasalem ku nu haremay.
ch: B:我剛翻過土，等等要播種。
en: B: I just turned over the soil, and so on to sow seeds.

ab: karuwa ta lra kikulang kananu sinalem na kulang?
ch: A:你種的菜可以收成了嗎?
en: A: Are your vegetables ready to be harvested?

ab: karuwa ta lra kikulang kana tamana i kani, na kenaw i kaziyu mu, ’azi ziya maruwa.
ch: B:這裡的高麗菜可以收成了，那裡的蔥就還不能收成。
en: B: The cabbages here are ready to harvest, but the scallions there are not yet ready to harvest.

ab: kiya! sazu nu kinivurasi.
ch: A:哇!你挖了這麼多的地瓜。
en: A: Wow! You dug up so many gourds.

ab: puwalrangay ku makutr puwa i puwalumayan maw?
ch: B:幫我放穀倉好嗎?
en: B: Will you help me with the barn?

ab: kemakuda mu?
ch: A:你們在做什麼?
en: A: What are you doing?

ab: tremavukulr mi za vulraw.
ch: B:我們在撒漁網抓魚。
en: B: We are casting nets to catch fish.

ab: sazu a vulraw i kani ziyamaw?
ch: A:這裡的魚多嗎?
en: A: Are there many fish here?

ab: sazu lra i karesis na vulraw ku ’inevang.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: sazu lra i kari’is na vulraw ku ’inevang.
ch: B:魚簍裡已經抓了很多魚。
en: B: The fish basket has been full of fish.

ab: kemuda u ’emevang za vulraw marayas?
ch: A:你平常怎麼抓魚?
en: A: How do you usually catch fish?

ab: mipangasip ku penangasip za vulraw,
ch: B:我都用釣具釣魚。
en: B: I always use fishing tackle to catch fish.

ab: malrazam u penana’ pa’alrup?
ch: A:你會用弓箭打獵嗎?
en: A: Do you know how to hunt with a bow and arrow?

ab: marayas ku penapetrir za rawa, nu eman mikuwang misuwan ku melrulruy.
ch: B:我通常都是用陷阱抓獵物，偶爾也會拿槍帶狗狩獵。
en: B: I usually catch my prey with a trap, but occasionally I hunt with a gun and a dog.

ab: i ini mu, nintaw wakalr kana vavuy.
ch: A:這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: This is the road the boar took.

ab: kemuda zi malrazam u?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: nintaw dinapalran kana vavuy i ini, semeneng, nintaw wakalr i ini.
ch: A:這是山豬的腳印，所以這是山豬所走的路。
en: A: These are the footprints of the boar, so this is the path the boar took.

ab: dikaya ta mukuwa melilruwa, kamawan za muetrir a eman.
ch: A:快去看我們的陷阱，好像抓到獵物了。
en: A: Go and see our trap, for it seems that we have caught our prey.

ab: kemuda zi malrazam u?
ch: B:你怎麼知道呢?
en: B: How do you know?

ab: kamawan za tremaulr za vali na suwan, ta kadikayay.
ch: A:狗好像聞到味道了。我們快跟過去。
en: A: The dog seems to have smelled it. Let’s follow them.

ab: demadaway u za eman harem?
ch: A:你正在製作的是什麼東西?
en: A: What are you working on?

ab: a salretevtevan i ini, papetrir za ’avutar.
ch: B:這是捕鼠夾，用來抓田鼠的。
en: B: This is a mouse trap, used to catch voles.

ab: a eman nu iretra’ i kaziyu?
ch: A:你放在那裡的是什麼東西?
en: A: What is that thing you put there?

ab: puwatilu’ i izu, naniyam papetrir za ’ura.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。！
en: B: That’s a foot-rope trap, we use it to catch Shankiang.

ab: sawail i izu, naniyam papetrir za ’ura.
ch: B:那是套腳式繩索陷阱，我們用它來抓山羌。
en: B: It was a leg-rigged rope trap, and we used it to catch Shankiang.

ab: lrayuwan kana temuwamuwan zatu iveray, sazu ta inetriran na rawa harem.
ch: A:感謝祖靈賜福，今天我們有很多獵物收獲。
en: A: Thanks to the blessing of our ancestors, we had a great harvest today.

ab: ai, ta puruma’aw i zekalr pu’atrar kananta niruma’enan.
ch: B:是啊!我們帶回部落分享給親友吧!
en: B: Yeah! Let’s bring it back to our tribe and share it with our friends and family!
